name: Zucchini with Leeks and Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 Small ripe firm tomatoes (peeled and quartered)
2 Tbsp leek (white part only), sliced thin
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrape pulp from tomatoes. Drain tomatoes on a paper towel.
2. In a medium saucepan, heat 1/4 teaspoon olive oil over medium heat.
3. Add leek and cook until tender, about 5 minutes, stirring often.
4. Add zucchini and sauté until crisp-tender, 5 minutes.
5. Sprinkle with cayenne and mix well.
6. Arrange around the heated serving platter. Cover to keep warm.
7. Add remaining 1/4 teaspoon olive oil to pan. Heat on medium-high.
8. Add tomatoes and toss until just heated through, about 2 minutes.
9. Arrange tomatoes in center of serving platter, surrounded by zucchini.
10. Serve immediately.
